name: Xenia Venture Capital Ltd
summary: Xenia Venture Capital Ltd is a venture capital firm specializing in seed, startups, early stage, and incubation investments. The firm prefers to invest in the high and medium technology sector with a focus on information technology, software (including enterprise IT, gaming, Internet, and mobile etc.), bio-tech, life science, and medical devices. It typically invests in companies based in Israel. The firm typically invests between $0.5 million and $1 million in seed financing. It also seeks to provide follow-on financing, mentoring, business and strategic counseling, fund raising assistance and exit planning as well as peripheral services pertaining to logistics, finance & accounting, office services and more. Xenia Venture Capital Ltd was founded in mid-2003 and is based in Tel Aviv, Israel.
